rationale: 교과서(미래엔 중1) III단원 도입(80~81쪽)이 이미 캠핑 서사로 세 가지 열의 이동을 모두 배치해 두었다: 석쇠·집게(전도), 버너 위 주전자(대류), 숯불의 열기와 낮의 햇볕(복사). 과학사 사례가 아니라 학생의 생활 경험이라 몰입 장벽이 낮고, 세 방식이 '같은 시공간'에 공존함을 보여 주면 '상황마다 이동 방식이 다르다'는 분류 감각(중단원 핵심 평가 포인트)이 자연스럽게 생긴다. 컷 구성은 관찰(현상) → 원리(입자 그림) → 대비(재질 차이)의 리듬으로, 전도에 3컷을 주어 '입자는 제자리에서 흔들림만 릴레이'라는 최다 오개념 지점을 집중 공략했다. 복사 컷에는 '사이를 가로막으면 온기가 사라진다'(스스로 확인하기 2번)를 심어 뒤의 복사 랩·문제와 호응한다.
style: u1l1과 동일한 손그림 스틱맨(흑선 + teal 강조 하나, 이미지 안 글자 금지, 캐릭터 동일 유지). 저장 경로 public/comics/u3l3/0..6.png

panels.title: 캠핑 온 스틱맨 쌤
panels.caption: 스틱맨 쌤이 캠핑장에 도착했어요. 텐트를 치는데 햇볕이 쨍쨍 — 해에 닿지도 않았는데 얼굴이 뜨끈뜨끈해요. 이상하지 않나요? 오늘 밤, 캠핑장 곳곳에 숨어 있는 '열이 이동하는 세 가지 방식'을 모두 만나 볼 거예요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here he arrives at a simple campsite and pitches a plain triangle tent, one hand wiping his brow as if feeling hot; in the sky a single big simple sun circle with straight rays beaming down toward him. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on the sun's rays; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, character and tent focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.
panels.termDef: 열이 전달되는 방식은 전도·대류·복사 세 가지. 캠핑장 곳곳에 숨어 있어요.

panels.title: 앗, 집게가 뜨거워!
panels.caption: 해가 지고 숯불 화로에 석쇠를 올렸어요. 쇠집게로 고기를 뒤집는데 — 잠시 후 불에 닿지도 않은 손잡이까지 뜨거워졌어요! 열이 집게의 불 쪽 끝에서 손잡이 끝까지 금속을 타고 차례차례 올라온 거예요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here it is night at the campsite: a simple round brazier with a grill grate on top and small meat pieces, he holds long metal tongs over the fire and jerks back startled, shaking his other hand; tiny wavy heat marks climb along the tongs from the fire end up to the handle. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on those wavy heat marks along the tongs; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, character and tongs focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.

panels.title: 입자 파도타기
panels.caption: 집게 속을 확대해 볼까요? 금속은 작은 입자들이 촘촘히 줄지어 있어요. 가열된 끝의 입자가 활발하게 흔들리면, 그 흔들림이 이웃한 입자에게 차례로 전달돼요. 입자는 제자리에서 흔들릴 뿐인데, 운동이 릴레이처럼 이어지며 열이 이동하죠. 이것이 전도예요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here he stands beside a large magnified diagram: a long horizontal metal rod drawn as a single row of touching small circles (particles), a small simple flame under the left end; the leftmost circles have strong vibration motion-lines, and the vibration marks get gradually weaker toward the right, showing the wiggle passing from neighbor to neighbor; he points at the row like a teacher. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on the vibration motion-lines traveling along the row; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, diagram focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.
panels.termDef: 물체를 구성하는 입자의 운동이 이웃한 입자에 차례로 전달되어 열이 이동하는 현상. 주로 고체에서 일어나요.

panels.title: 쇠는 뜨겁고 나무는 멀쩡?
panels.caption: 그런데 나무젓가락으로 집으면 손이 안 뜨거워요. 열이 전도되는 정도는 물질의 종류에 따라 달라요. 금속은 열이 잘 이동하고, 나무나 유리는 잘 이동하지 않죠. 냄비 몸통은 금속, 손잡이는 플라스틱인 이유예요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here he holds up two utensils side by side above a small campfire for comparison: in one hand long metal tongs with many wavy heat marks along them while he blows on that hand, in the other hand plain wooden chopsticks with no heat marks, looking relieved at the wooden side. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on the metal tongs; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, two-props comparison focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.

panels.title: 주전자 물이 빙글빙글
panels.caption: 버너 위 주전자는 아래만 데우는데 물 전체가 끓어요. 바닥에서 뜨거워진 물 입자는 위로 올라가고, 위에 있던 차가운 물 입자는 아래로 내려와요. 입자들이 직접 빙글빙글 돌며 열을 실어 나르죠. 이것이 대류 — 액체와 기체에서 일어나요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here he crouches next to a small camping burner with a kettle drawn in simple cutaway view showing water inside: two big circular loop arrows inside the kettle show water rising in the middle above the flame and sinking along the sides, a few small bubbles at the bottom, a little steam curl from the spout; he watches with curiosity. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on the circular loop arrows inside the kettle; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, kettle cutaway focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.
panels.termDef: 물질을 구성하는 입자들이 직접 이동하면서 열을 전달하는 현상. 액체·기체에서 일어나요.

panels.title: 닿지 않아도 뜨겁다
panels.caption: 모닥불 곁에 앉으니 얼굴이 후끈해요. 불에 닿은 것도 아닌데요! 열이 아무 물질도 거치지 않고 직접 날아온 거예요. 친구가 불 앞을 가로막자 온기가 뚝 — 열이 직진으로 오다가 막힌 거죠. 낮의 햇볕도 같은 방식이에요. 태양의 열은 텅 빈 우주를 건너 지구까지 와요. 이것이 복사예요.
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here it is night: he sits happily on one side warming his hands at a simple campfire, straight gentle wavy rays travel directly from the fire through empty air to his face and hands; a second plain stick figure friend is stepping between him and the fire, and the rays visibly stop at the friend's back leaving the scientist's side without rays, the scientist looking surprised. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on the wavy rays coming from the fire; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, fire and rays focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.
panels.termDef: 열이 물질을 통하지 않고 직접 이동하는 현상. 난로의 열기, 태양의 햇볕이 복사예요.

panels.title: 캠핑장의 열 삼형제
panels.caption: 오늘 하루에 세 가지가 다 있었어요. 쇠집게를 타고 차례로 전달된 전도, 주전자 속 입자가 직접 돌며 나른 대류, 모닥불에서 물질 없이 직접 날아온 복사. 이제 무대에서 하나씩 직접 실험해 봐요!
panels.imagenPrompt: hand-drawn stick figure comic panel, black ink on clean white paper, thin uniform line weight, xkcd / whiteboard-marker doodle style, minimalist line art, no shading, no gradients, flat, charming educational. The same recurring stick-figure scientist character, kept identical: round circle head, two tiny round glasses, a short open lab coat drawn with a few lines, plain stick arms and legs. Here he stands proudly at the campsite at night with both arms raised in a ta-da pose, tent and small campfire behind him; floating around his head are three small simple doodles: metal tongs with tiny wavy marks, a small kettle with one circular loop arrow, and a little flame with straight rays. Exactly one restrained accent color, teal, used only on those three small floating doodles; everything else pure black and white. Square 1:1, single panel, generous white space, character celebration focused. absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no speech bubbles, no captions, no labels anywhere in the image. NOT 3D, NOT photorealistic, NOT glossy render, NOT digital painting, NOT anime.

lessonFlow: 전도 랩: 입자 진동 릴레이 관찰 + 구리/철/유리 3막대 예측 레이스
대류 랩: 주전자 순환 관찰 + 냉난방기 배치 실험
복사 랩: 파동 직진 + 가림판으로 차단 실험
문제: binSort(사례 분류) · 그림 mcq(열화상 3막대) · mcq(냉난방기 위치) · multi(복사 성질) · mcq(온돌)
